reef._comment: HARDENED REDEPLOY #2 (2026-06-14): carries the multi-agent adversarial fixes #21/#23/#27 LIVE on top of the donation-proof/realized-PnL set (#13/#15). #21 = setReputationSource is now one-shot + no-EOA + agentId/identity-bound (an agent can no longer repoint its reputation writer to its own EOA and mint arbitrary reputation — proven on-chain: setReputationSource reverts 'source already set'). #23 = governor removeVault on AgentIndex+Allocator. #27 = ReputationBond requestUnbond cooldown. Prior hardened instance (no #21/#23/#27): identity 0xDc9a22A75bAA45cb4d93e6015d7753FF8F696Be6. Original gameable instance: identity 0x4eCE1853623CA801536d319cB9ddE454f5dA6dC7. UNAUDITED.

tradeableIndex.name: Reef AI Yield Index
tradeableIndex.note: The AgentIndex itself is the ERC-20 rINDEX (transfer/approve/transferFrom over index shares). Same address as reef.AgentIndex.

yieldAdapter.note: MockStrategyAdapter for agent 1 under the HARDENED realized-PnL model: strategy yield is REALIZED via recall (enters deployedCostBasis) before it credits reputation, so unrealized marks and bare donations no longer move reputation (#13/#15). Not a live-accruing mark. Mantlescan-verified.

reputationBond.note: DECENTRALIZED ARBITER (2026-06-15): arbiter is now the 2-of-3 ArbiterCouncil 0xC35686E3..., NOT a single EOA - no one party can resolve/slash a dispute. Moved via transferArbiter+acceptArbiter under M-of-N. Two-step unbond cooldown (requestUnbond->withdrawBond, #27). All 5 agents bonded 50e18; index bond-gate ACTIVE via setReputationBond(bond, 10e18). Mantlescan-verified.

arbiterCouncil._comment: Decentralized arbiter for reputationBond (chain 5003, 2026-06-15). Minimal 2-of-3 M-of-N council: ArbiterCouncil.confirm(target,data) executes the call once `threshold` DISTINCT members confirm the same op - so no single party can resolve or slash a dispute. PROVEN LIVE: dispute #1 (agent1) resolved upheld with a 5e18 slash by 2 of 3 members - the 1st confirm did NOT execute, the 2nd did (accept tx 0x50b6442f, resolve tx 0x715412f5). Escape hatch: members can confirm transferArbiter(newArbiter) to rotate away, so dispute resolution can never be bricked. NOTE: members here are keys we control (deployer/arena/meth) to demo the mechanism on testnet; production members are independent parties. Mantlescan-verified.

seasons.note: On-chain Human-vs-AI Seasons. Season 0 open (7-day); all 5 hardened agents enrolled (even agentId=AI, odd=Human). Mantlescan-verified.

mainnetReferences.comment: Verified addresses on Mantle MAINNET (chain 5000), pinned here for mainnet demo deployment only. Sepolia uses mocks. FBTC/USDe/MI4 added 2026-06-01 for the FbtcAdapter/UsdeAdapter/Mi4Adapter (on-chain-verified: symbol+decimals read from chain 5000).

dexNavDemo._comment: Standalone REAL DEX-backed-NAV proof (chain 5003, deployed 2026-06-07, all Mantlescan-verified). An AgentVault whose nav() is the LIVE FusionX V2 mark-to-market of a real long position (rdUSD->rdETH) — not simulated linear yield. Stands up its own deep 1:1 pool so price impact is small; isolated from the seeded 5-vault leaderboard. Observed on-chain nav() = 0.99683e18 (1.0 minus the real ~0.32% round-trip trading cost). Reproduce: script/DeployDexNav.s.sol.

dex.name: FusionX V2
dex._comment: Mantle-native Uniswap-V2 DEX on Sepolia (chain 5003). Addresses RPC-verified on-chain 2026-06-03 (FusionX docs labels are swapped — these are the real ones). A real MNT->USDC swap was executed (tx 0xd90ed8d2...). Used for live AI agent execution.

arena._comment: Strategy-arena head-to-head (chain 5003, 2026-06-08): 2 AgentVaults, one per persona, holding raUSD and deploying into a SHARED raUSD/raETH FusionX pool pegged to live ETH by arena_keeper.py (uses ARENA_PRIVATE_KEY). Reputation is NAV-derived, so the leaderboard reflects which strategy times ETH exposure best. Deployed from a dedicated arena key to avoid nonce races with the deployer-key crons.

reefGuard._comment: On-chain policy gate (chain 5003, 2026-06-08): canExecute(agentId,asset,sizeBps)->(allowed,reason) checking registration, ERC-8004 reputation, bond, open disputes, asset allowlist, action size. Any Mantle protocol can query it before letting an agent act. Governor = arena key. Wired to live AgentIdentity + ReputationBond.
reefGuard.mockProtocolNote: Reference EXTERNAL protocol (chain 5003, 2026-06-09) that gates an agent action behind ReefGuard.canExecute() before letting it touch capital - reverts with the policy reason if not cleared. Deployed wired to the live ReefGuard; a real gated action executed on-chain for agent 1 (emits ActionExecuted). Proves Reef is infrastructure other Mantle protocols call, not a dashboard. Mantlescan-verified.

trustOracle._comment: Standalone public Trust Oracle (chain 5003, 2026-06-11). The single on-chain read surface for 'how much should capital trust this agent?' - scoreOf(agentId) returns a 0..1e18 Trust Score computed in-source from the same 4 components as scores.json (reputation 40% / freshness 20% / drawdown 20% / bond 20%), report(agentId,asset,sizeBps) folds in ReefGuard's live verdict. Pure views: any Mantle protocol can read trust without running Reef's stack. HARDENED 2026-06-14: scoreOf reads reputableNav (donation-proof). Wired to the hardened AgentIdentity + ReputationBond + ReefGuard; the 5 hardened agents registered. On-chain scoreOf matches scores.json (verifiable parity). Governor = deployer. Mantlescan-verified.
trustOracle.consumerNote: TrustOracleConsumer reference: an external protocol that gates AND sizes credit by Trust Score - drawCredit reverts below min 0.55 (rating 'A'), limit = baseLimit * score/1e18. The trust-weighted-capital integration shape. Mantlescan-verified.

complianceRegistry._comment: On-chain KYC / accreditation / jurisdiction attestation registry (chain 5003, 2026-06-15). A composable compliance primitive any Mantle protocol reads via screen(address)->(eligible,reason) before letting an address into a gated flow - checks KYC, accreditation, expiry, and an ISO-3166 jurisdiction blocklist. Licensed issuers post attestations via attest(); the reef compliance_screen.py agent uses Z.ai GLM to decide+attest with evidenceHash=keccak(rationale) (AI-assisted compliance, verifiable). selfAttestDemo() is a TESTNET-ONLY one-click demo KYC (owner-disablable via setDemoEnabled). Owner/issuer = deployer. Seeded: DPRK(408)+Iran(364) blocked; deployer attested (US, accredited). Deposits/allocations in the dApp are gated on screen(). Mantlescan-verified.

a2a._comment: Agent-to-agent (A2A) signal marketplace (chain 5003, 2026-06-09). Standalone AgentIdentity + SignalMarket: provider agents list priced signals under categories; consumer agents buy them and payment routes provider->wallet. Lifetime sales/revenue are tracked ON-CHAIN per provider (salesOf/revenueOf) + globally (totalSales/totalRevenueWei) and read in one call via getActiveListings() - no log scanning. Reputation is NOT credited by purchases (vault-only model, so A2A cannot farm ERC-8004 reputation). Seeded with 3 listings + 3 real purchases. Deployed from the arena key (also each agent's wallet). Isolated from the live leaderboard instance. Mantlescan-verified.

allocator._comment: Trust-weighted capital allocator (chain 5003, 2026-06-09). LPs deposit the index asset; rebalance() allocates across the 5 seeded AgentVaults weighted by each agent's ON-CHAIN Trust Score (same 4 components as scores.json: reputation/freshness/drawdown/bond), gated by the active mandate (qualification bar + per-agent concentration cap). Conservative active: min Trust 70/100 (excludes the lowest-trust agent), 35% cap. Seeded 100e18 + rebalanced live. Governor = arena key. Mantlescan-verified.

erc8004Canonical._comment: Mantle's OFFICIAL canonical ERC-8004 registries on Sepolia (the erc-8004 team's cross-testnet singletons, vanity 0x8004... CREATE2 addresses; the Sepolia proxies point at the SAME implementations as the source-verified Mantle-mainnet registries - impl 0x7274e874... identity / 0x16e0fa7f... reputation, checked on-chain 2026-06-10). Re-registered 2026-06-14 for the HARDENED agents (same agentURIs /api/agent/N.json bound to the new AgentVaults). Registered by agents/scripts/canonical_register.py from the registrant key.

permissionedAllocator._comment: Permissioned Allocator for compliance-sensitive RWA flows (chain 5003, 2026-06-09). Same trust-weighted mandate allocation as the open instance, but the depositor allowlist is ON: only governor-approved (e.g. KYC'd) addresses may deposit; withdrawals stay open. Real on-chain access control, not a claimed off-chain check. The deployer was allowlisted and made a live 50e18 deposit + rebalance; a non-allowlisted deposit reverts 'depositor not allowed' (proven via eth_call from 0x..dEaD). Mantlescan-verified.
